subcodes.first_line: We make mention of that which draweth mankind nigh unto God, the Lord of all worlds, and teacheth all that which shall profit them in every realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر ما یقرب الناس الی الله رب العالمین و یعلم الکل ما ینفعهم فی کل عالم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @praise and encouragement
